briefs.title: BC Casinos Must Follow New Anti-Money Laundering Rules Starting April 2026
briefs.summary: A new BC regulation takes effect April 13, 2026, setting formal rules for casinos and gaming operators to prevent and detect money laundering (illegally disguising dirty money as legitimate funds). It defines key terms like high-value chips ($5,000+), patron accounts, and money services businesses.
briefs.action_required: Review your casino or gaming operation's compliance program against the new Prevention and Detection of Unlawful Activities Regulation before April 13, 2026.

key_dates.label: BC Prevention and Detection of Unlawful Activities Regulation takes effect
